notes: Solid, complete breakout implementation with proper ball physics, brick collision, lives, levels, pause, and high score; minor issue with ball speed scaling making higher levels potentially very fast, but overall well-executed.
Solid implementation with excellent controls, but suffers from framerate-dependent movement and a mismatched ball collision radius.

A solid Breakout clone with working core loop and decent presentation, but controls/state handling are inconsistent (mouse advertised over keyboard benchmark, Escape pauses instead of returning to title except on game over, and ball sizing/collision logic is slightly sloppy) so it falls short of a polished benchmark-quality build.
